FMT 16S Microbiome Analysis

April Jauhal

2026-04-16

This notebook contains code used for figure analysis in figures 1 and 2. In this workflow, 16S data is processed, alpha and beta diversity and ANCOMBC2 analysis is performed, and data is formatted for RPCA analysis (see RPCA.ipynb). Also contains code used to generate Figure 1, as well as example code for the generation of figure 2 (final Figure 2 subfigures were generated in PRISM).

Data Processing

Set Directory

FMT_dir = "C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Morrowitz_16S/2024_Jul_FMT/"
FMT_figpath = paste0(FMT_dir, "/Figures/")
FMT_RPCA_path = paste0(FMT_dir, "/RPCA_3/")

Loading libraries

library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(phyloseq)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(vegan)
## Loading required package: permute
## Loading required package: lattice
## This is vegan 2.6-4
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(ANCOMBC)
library(ggprism)

Defining colors for plots to align with prism color scheme

five_colors <- c(
  "FMT-ABX" = "#AD07E3",
  "FMT-HD" = "#FF8000",
  "PBS" = "#00C000",
  "Untreated" = "#0000FF", 
  "ABX (2W)" = "#FF0000")
 
three_colors <- c(
  "FMT-ABX" = "#FF0000",
  "FMT-HD" = "#00C000",
  "PBS" = "#0000FF"
)

four_colors <- c(
  "FMT-ABX" = "#AD07E3",
  "FMT-HD" = "#FF8000",
  "PBS" = "#00C000",
  "Untreated" = "#0000FF")

Loading 16S dataset and converting to physeq objects

theme_set(theme_bw())

# Create figure path if it doesn't already exist
if (!dir.exists(FMT_figpath)) {
  dir.create(FMT_figpath, recursive = TRUE)
}

count_table = read_xlsx(paste0(FMT_dir, "FMT_July2024_16S_Sequencing_Stats.xlsx"),
                        sheet="Microbial Composition") %>% 
  dplyr::rename(taxonomy=`Amplicon Sequencing Variant (ASV)`) 
sample_info = read_xlsx(paste0(FMT_dir, "FMT_July2024_16S_Sequencing_Stats.xlsx"),
                        sheet="Metadata") %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% mutate(Cage = paste0(Label, "_", Cage)) %>%
  mutate(Treatment = case_when(Label == "ABX" ~ "ABX (2W)",
                               Label == "Donor" ~ "Donor", 
                               Label == "FMTABX" ~ "FMT-ABX",
                               Label == "FMTCTRL" ~ "FMT-HD",
                               Label == "FMTPBS" ~ "PBS",
                               Label == "Naive" ~ "Untreated",
                               TRUE ~ NA,
                               ))


bridge_otu_df = count_table %>% dplyr::select(`taxonomy`) 
bridge_otu_df$ID = paste0("otu_", 1:nrow(bridge_otu_df))


tax_df <- data.frame(str_split(count_table$taxonomy, ';')) %>% t() %>% data.frame
colnames(tax_df) <- c("Domain", "Phylum",  "Class",  "Order",  "Family",  "Genus", "Species")
tax_df <- tax_df %>% dplyr::mutate(taxonomy = apply(., 1, function(row) paste(row, collapse = ";"))) %>% left_join(bridge_otu_df) %>% dplyr::select(-taxonomy) %>% tibble::column_to_rownames('ID') 
## Joining with `by = join_by(taxonomy)`
tax_df[] <- lapply(lapply(tax_df, function(x) sub("[a-z]__", "", x)), function(x) sub("^__$", "Unknown", x)) 

new_taxa_table = tax_df %>% slice(0)
for (each_genus in unique(tax_df$Genus)) {
  subset_df = tax_df %>% filter(Genus==each_genus)
  if (each_genus %in% c("uncultured", "Unknown")) {
    subset_df = subset_df %>% mutate(Genus = paste0(Genus, "_", row_number()))
  }
  new_taxa_table = rbind(new_taxa_table, subset_df)
}


otu_df = count_table %>% left_join(bridge_otu_df) %>% select(-taxonomy) %>% tibble::column_to_rownames('ID')
## Joining with `by = join_by(taxonomy)`
rownames(sample_info) <- sample_info$Sample

# Version for original relative abundance
FMT_physeq_rel = phyloseq(otu_table(otu_df, taxa_are_rows=TRUE), tax_table(as.matrix(new_taxa_table)), sample_data(sample_info))

seq_stats = read_xlsx(paste0(FMT_dir, "FMT_July2024_16S_Sequencing_Stats.xlsx"),
                      sheet="Sequencing Statistics")
count_data = otu_df
for (sampleid in seq_stats$`Sample Name`) {
  num_reads = seq_stats %>% filter(`Sample Name`==sampleid) %>% pull(`Total Read Pairs`)
  count_data[sampleid] <- round(count_table[sampleid]*num_reads, digits = 0)
}

# Version for whole counts 
FMT_physeq_counts = phyloseq(otu_table(as.matrix(count_data), taxa_are_rows=TRUE), tax_table(as.matrix(new_taxa_table)), sample_data(sample_info))

Filtering out mitochondria and choloroplast DNA and calculating relative abundance

# Version for relative abundance without mitochondria/chloroplasts
FMT_physeq_filtered_rel = transform_sample_counts(subset_taxa(FMT_physeq_rel, !Genus %in% c("Mitochondria", "Chloroplast")), function(x) x / sum(x))

# Version for whole counts without michrondria/chloroplasts
FMT_physeq_filtered_counts = subset_taxa(FMT_physeq_counts, !Genus %in% c("Mitochondria", "Chloroplast"))

Constructing relative abundance barplots (class)

barplots are shown in Figure 1B

library(RColorBrewer)
set.seed(2)
palette <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(12, "Paired"))(50)
palette_scrambled <- sample(palette, 50)

# class-level plotting data
plot_data_class0 = FMT_physeq_filtered_rel %>%
  tax_glom(taxrank = "Class") %>%                     
  psmelt() %>% group_by(Class, Sample) %>% dplyr::summarize(class_count = sum(Abundance)) %>% left_join(sample_data(FMT_physeq_filtered_rel)) 
## Warning in psmelt(.): The sample variables: 
## Sample
##  have been renamed to: 
## sample_Sample
## to avoid conflicts with special phyloseq plot attribute names.
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Class'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
## Joining with `by = join_by(Sample)`
class_1perc = plot_data_class0 %>% group_by(Class) %>% 
  dplyr::summarize(max = max(class_count)) %>%
  filter(max >= 0.01) %>% pull(Class)
plot_data_class = plot_data_class0 %>% mutate(Class = ifelse(Class %in% class_1perc, Class, "Other"))


collapse_class <- function(label, timepoint) {
  df = plot_data_class %>%
      filter(Label==label, Timepoint==timepoint) %>%
            group_by(Label, Class) %>%
      dplyr::summarize(x=sum(class_count), Timepoint=timepoint, Label=label) %>%
        unique() 
  return(df %>% mutate(class_count = x/sum(df$x, na.rm = TRUE)))
}
grouped_plot_data_class <- do.call(rbind,
        list(collapse_class("FMTPBS", 0),
             collapse_class("FMTPBS", 14),
             collapse_class("FMTPBS", 24),
             collapse_class("FMTCTRL", 0),
             collapse_class("FMTCTRL", 14),
             collapse_class("FMTCTRL", 24),
             collapse_class("FMTABX", 0),
             collapse_class("FMTABX", 14),
             collapse_class("FMTABX", 24)))
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Label'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Label'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Label'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Label'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Label'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Label'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Label'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Label'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'Label'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
rel_barplot_class = ggarrange(
  ggplot(grouped_plot_data_class %>%
           mutate(Label = ifelse(Label=="FMTABX", "FMT-ABX",
                                 ifelse(Label=="FMTPBS", "PBS",
                                        ifelse(Label=="FMTCTRL", "FMT-HD", NA)))), aes(y=as.factor(Timepoint), x=class_count, fill=Class)) + geom_bar(stat="identity") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom", 
        strip.text.y= element_text(size=8),
        strip.text.x= element_text(size=8)) +
  facet_grid(.~Label) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_scrambled) + scale_color_manual(values = palette_scrambled) + ylab("Timepoint") + xlab("Relative Abundance"),
  ggplot(plot_data_class %>% filter(!is.na(FMT_Donor)) %>%
           mutate(Subject = ifelse(Subject=="Donor_Abx", "Antibiotics",
                                 ifelse(Subject=="Donor_CTRL", "Control", NA))), aes(y=as.factor(Subject), x=class_count, fill=Class)) + geom_bar(stat="identity") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
        strip.text.y= element_text(size=8),
        strip.text.x= element_text(size=8)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_scrambled) + scale_color_manual(values = palette_scrambled) + ylab("Donor") + xlab("Relative Abundance"),
  common.legend = TRUE, widths = c(2,1), legend = "bottom")
rel_barplot_class

ggexport(rel_barplot_class, dpi = 600, width = 700, height=200, filename = paste0(FMT_figpath, "rel_barplot_class.png"))
## [1] "C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Morrowitz_16S/2024_Jul_FMT//Figures/rel_barplot_class%03d.png"
## file saved to C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Morrowitz_16S/2024_Jul_FMT//Figures/rel_barplot_class%03d.png

Alpha Diversity analysis

Alpha diversity analysis was initially performed by SeqCenter, results are parsed here and used to generate sublots for Figure 1FG.

Alpha_df = read_xlsx(paste0(FMT_dir, "FMT_July2024_16S_Sequencing_Stats.xlsx"),
                     sheet="Alpha Diversity Metrics")
div_sample_data = sample_data(FMT_physeq_filtered_rel) %>% data.frame() %>% left_join(Alpha_df) 
## Joining with `by = join_by(Sample)`
rownames(div_sample_data) <- div_sample_data$Sample
sample_data(FMT_physeq_filtered_rel) <- sample_data(div_sample_data)

rich_plot = ggplot(div_sample_data %>% filter(!is.na(Timepoint), Timepoint==24) %>%
                     mutate(TP_label = ifelse(Timepoint==24, "Day 24", NA)), 
                   aes(x=Treatment, y=`Observed Features`, color=Treatment)) +
    geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1) +
    facet_grid(.~TP_label) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
    theme(legend.position = "left") +
    geom_point() + theme(legend.position = "none") +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("FMT-HD", "Untreated"),
                                          c("PBS", "Untreated"),
                                          c("FMT-ABX", "Untreated")), label = "p.signif",
                       bracket.size = 0.75, tip.length = 0) 

faith_plot = ggplot(div_sample_data %>% filter(!is.na(Timepoint), Timepoint==24) %>%
                     mutate(TP_label = ifelse(Timepoint==24, "Day 24", NA)), 
                    aes(x=Treatment, y=`Faith's Phylogenetic Diversity`, color=Treatment)) +
    geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1) +
    facet_grid(.~TP_label) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + 
    theme(legend.position = "left") +
    geom_point() + theme(legend.position = "none") +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("FMT-HD", "Untreated"),
                                          c("PBS", "Untreated"),
                                          c("FMT-ABX", "Untreated")), label = "p.signif",
                       bracket.size = 0.75, tip.length = 0) 

rich_prism_plot = rich_plot + theme_prism(base_size = 12) +
  scale_color_manual(values = four_colors) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1))

faith_prism_plot = faith_plot + theme_prism(base_size = 12) +
  scale_color_manual(values = four_colors) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1))

alpha_div_plot = ggarrange(rich_prism_plot, faith_prism_plot, nrow = 1)

ggexport(alpha_div_plot,
         dpi = 300, width = 600, height = 400, filename = paste0(FMT_figpath, "diversity.png"))
## [1] "C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Morrowitz_16S/2024_Jul_FMT//Figures/diversity%03d.png"
## file saved to C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Morrowitz_16S/2024_Jul_FMT//Figures/diversity%03d.png
alpha_div_plot

## Beta diversity analysis Beta diversity calculations were performed on filtered relative abundance data

meta = data.frame(sample_data(FMT_physeq_filtered_rel)) %>%
  mutate(Treatment = case_when(Label == "ABX" ~ "ABX (2W)",
                               Label == "Donor" ~ "Donor", 
                               Label == "FMTABX" ~ "FMT-ABX",
                               Label == "FMTCTRL" ~ "FMT-HD",
                               Label == "FMTPBS" ~ "PBS",
                               Label == "Naive" ~ "Untreated",
                               TRUE ~ NA,
                               ))
otu = t(otu_table(FMT_physeq_filtered_rel))
jsd_res <- distance(t(otu_table(FMT_physeq_filtered_rel)), method='jsd')

jaccard = distance(otu, method='jaccard')

FMT_genus <- tax_glom(FMT_physeq_filtered_rel, taxrank = "Genus", NArm = TRUE) 
otu_genus = t(otu_table(FMT_genus)) 
jaccard_genus = distance(otu_genus, method='jaccard')

FMT_family <- tax_glom(FMT_physeq_filtered_rel, taxrank = "Family", NArm = TRUE) 
otu_family = t(otu_table(FMT_family)) 
jaccard_family = distance(otu_family, method='jaccard')

Comparing ABX-treated and FMT-ABX samples to initial timepoint

jaccard_FMT_dur_df = data.frame(Label=character(), Comparison=logical(), TP_Comparison=logical(), Jaccard=numeric())

Sample_list5 = list(meta %>% filter(Label=="FMTCTRL", Timepoint %in% c(24, 14, 0)) %>% pull(Sample),
                    meta %>% filter(Label=="FMTABX", Timepoint %in% c(24, 14, 0 )) %>% pull(Sample),
                    meta %>% filter(Label=="FMTPBS", Timepoint %in% c(24, 14, 0 )) %>% pull(Sample))
for (Samples in Sample_list5) {
  for(each_sample in Samples) {
    
    Sample_Label = meta %>% filter(Sample==each_sample) %>% pull(Treatment)
    Sample_Time = meta %>% filter(Sample==each_sample) %>% pull(Timepoint)
    
    for (compare_sample in unlist(Sample_list5[Sample_list5!=each_sample])) {
      Compare_Sample_Label = meta %>% filter(Sample==compare_sample) %>% pull(Treatment) 
      Compare_Sample_Time = meta %>% filter(Sample==compare_sample) %>% pull(Timepoint) 

      each_df = data.frame(Treatment=Sample_Label, 
                           Comparison = ifelse(Sample_Label==Compare_Sample_Label, 'Self', 'Other'),
                           TP_Comparison =  case_when(Sample_Time == 24 & Compare_Sample_Time == 24  ~ "24 vs. 24 Days",
                                                      Sample_Time == 24 & Compare_Sample_Time == 14 ~ "24 vs. 14 Days",
                                                      Sample_Time == 14 & Compare_Sample_Time == 24 ~ "14 vs. 24 Days",
                                                      Sample_Time == 14 & Compare_Sample_Time == 14 ~ "14 vs. 14 Days",
                                                      Sample_Time == 0 & Compare_Sample_Time == 0 ~ "0 vs. 0 Days",
                                                      Sample_Time == 0 & Compare_Sample_Time == 14 ~ "0 vs. 14 Days",
                                                      Sample_Time == 14 & Compare_Sample_Time == 0 ~ "14 vs. 0 Days",
                                                      Sample_Time == 0 & Compare_Sample_Time == 24 ~ "0 vs. 24 Days",
                                                      Sample_Time == 24 & Compare_Sample_Time == 0 ~ "24 vs. 0 Days",
                                                      TRUE ~ "Other"),
                           Jaccard=as.matrix(jaccard)[each_sample, compare_sample])
      jaccard_FMT_dur_df = rbind(jaccard_FMT_dur_df, each_df)
    }
  }
}

Building subplots for figure 1CDE

jaccard_FMPT_dur_subplot1 = jaccard_FMT_dur_df %>% filter(Comparison=="Self", TP_Comparison %in% c('0 vs. 0 Days', '0 vs. 14 Days', '0 vs. 24 Days')) %>% ggplot(aes(x=TP_Comparison, y=Jaccard, color = Treatment)) + geom_boxplot() + 
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1) + xlab("Comparison") + ylab("Pairwise Jaccard Distances") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0 vs. 0 Days", "0 vs. 14 Days"),
                                          c("0 vs. 14 Days", "0 vs. 24 Days")), 
                       bracket.size = 0.75, tip.length = 0) + facet_grid(.~Treatment)
  
jaccard_FMPT_dur_subplot2 =   jaccard_FMT_dur_df %>% filter(Comparison=="Self", TP_Comparison %in% c('0 vs. 14 Days')) %>% ggplot(aes(x=Treatment, y=Jaccard, color = Treatment)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1) +
  xlab("Comparison") + ylab("Pairwise Jaccard Distances") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("FMT-ABX", "FMT-HD"),
                                          c("FMT-ABX", "PBS"),
                                          c("PBS", "FMT-HD")), 
                       bracket.size = 0.75, tip.length = 0) + facet_grid(.~TP_Comparison)
jaccard_FMPT_dur_subplot3 =     jaccard_FMT_dur_df %>% filter(Comparison=="Self", TP_Comparison %in% c('0 vs. 24 Days')) %>% ggplot(aes(x=Treatment, y=Jaccard, color = Treatment)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1) +
  xlab("Comparison") + ylab("Pairwise Jaccard Distances") + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("FMT-ABX", "FMT-HD"),
                                          c("FMT-ABX", "PBS"),
                                          c("PBS", "FMT-HD")), 
                       bracket.size = 0.75, tip.length = 0) + facet_grid(.~TP_Comparison)

jaccard_FMPT_dur_subprism1 = jaccard_FMPT_dur_subplot1 + theme_prism(base_size = 12) +
  scale_color_manual(values = three_colors) + theme(legend.position="none",
                                                    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1))
jaccard_FMPT_dur_subprism2 = jaccard_FMPT_dur_subplot2 + theme_prism(base_size = 12) +
  scale_color_manual(values = three_colors) + theme(legend.position="none",
                                                    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1))
jaccard_FMPT_dur_subprism3 = jaccard_FMPT_dur_subplot3 + theme_prism(base_size = 12) +
  scale_color_manual(values = three_colors) + theme(legend.position="none",
                                                    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1))

jaccard_FMT_dur_plot_prism = ggarrange(jaccard_FMPT_dur_subprism1, jaccard_FMPT_dur_subprism2, jaccard_FMPT_dur_subprism3, nrow = 1, widths = c(2,1, 1))
## Warning in wilcox.test.default(c(0, 0.369810151396269, 0.314515540913814, :
## cannot compute exact p-value with ties

jaccard_FMT_dur_plot_prism

ggexport(jaccard_FMT_dur_plot_prism,
         dpi = 300, width = 600, height = 400, filename = paste0(FMT_figpath, "Treatment_effect.png"))
## [1] "C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Morrowitz_16S/2024_Jul_FMT//Figures/Treatment_effect%03d.png"

Comparing day 24 samples to their donors for supplementary figure 1

jaccard_donor_df = data.frame(Label=character(), Cagemate=logical(), Jaccard=numeric())

Sample_list2 = list(meta %>% filter(Label=="FMTCTRL", Timepoint==24) %>% pull(Sample),
                    meta %>% filter(Label=="FMTABX", Timepoint==24) %>% pull(Sample),
                    meta %>% filter(Label=="FMTPBS", Timepoint==24) %>% pull(Sample))
for (Samples in Sample_list2) {
  for(each_sample in Samples) {
    
    Sample_Label = meta %>% filter(Sample==each_sample) %>% pull(Treatment)

    for (compare_sample in meta %>% filter(!is.na(FMT_Donor)) %>% pull(Sample)) {
      Donor_type = meta %>% filter(Sample==compare_sample) %>% pull(FMT_Donor) 
      each_df = data.frame(Treatment=Sample_Label, 
                           Donor_type = Donor_type,
                           Jaccard=as.matrix(jaccard)[each_sample, compare_sample])
      jaccard_donor_df = rbind(jaccard_donor_df, each_df)
    }
  }
}

jaccard_donor_plot = jaccard_donor_df %>% 
  mutate(Donor_label = case_when(Donor_type=="Donor_ABX" ~ "ABX-treated Donor",
                                 Donor_type=="Donor_CTRL" ~ "Control Donor",
                                 TRUE ~ NA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Donor_label, y=Jaccard, color = Treatment)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1) + 
  ylab("\nDay 24 Jaccard Distance to Donor") + xlab("Donor Type") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = 'none') +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("ABX-treated Donor", "Control Donor")),
                     bracket.size = 0.75, tip.length = 0) + facet_grid(.~Treatment) 

jaccard_donor_plot2 = jaccard_donor_df %>% 
  mutate(Donor_label = case_when(Donor_type=="Donor_ABX" ~ "ABX-treated Donor",
                                 Donor_type=="Donor_CTRL" ~ "Control Donor",
                                 TRUE ~ NA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Treatment, y=Jaccard, color = Treatment)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1) + 
  ylab("Day 24 Jaccard Distance to Donor") + xlab("Treatment") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = 'none') +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("FMT-ABX", "FMT-HD"),
                                          c("FMT-ABX", "PBS"),
                                          c("PBS", "FMT-HD")),
                     bracket.size = 0.75, tip.length = 0) + facet_grid(.~Donor_label)

jaccard_donor_prism_plot =jaccard_donor_plot + theme_prism(base_size = 12) +
  scale_color_manual(values = three_colors) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
        legend.position = 'none')

jaccard_donor_prism_plot2 = jaccard_donor_plot2 + theme_prism(base_size = 12) +
  scale_color_manual(values = three_colors) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
        legend.position = 'none')

ggarrange(jaccard_donor_prism_plot, jaccard_donor_prism_plot2)

ggexport(ggarrange(jaccard_donor_prism_plot, jaccard_donor_prism_plot2),
         dpi = 300, width = 500, height = 400, filename = paste0(FMT_figpath, "Donor_comparison.png"))
## [1] "C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Morrowitz_16S/2024_Jul_FMT//Figures/Donor_comparison%03d.png"
## file saved to C:/Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/Morrowitz_16S/2024_Jul_FMT//Figures/Donor_comparison%03d.png

ANCOMBC2 analysis

Main analysis (Results used to construct Figure 2D in PRISM)

set.seed(123)
res_label_24_genus <- ancombc2(data = subset_samples(subset_samples(FMT_physeq_filtered_counts, Label %in% c("FMTABX", "FMTCTRL", "FMTPBS")), Timepoint ==24),
                          tax_level = "Genus",
                          fix_formula = "Label",
                          rand_formula = NULL,
                          p_adj_method = "holm", pseudo_sens = TRUE,
                          prv_cut = 0, lib_cut = 0, s0_perc = 0.05,
                          group = "Label", struc_zero = TRUE, neg_lb = FALSE,
                          alpha = 0.05, n_cl = 2, verbose = TRUE,
                          global = TRUE, pairwise = TRUE, dunnet = TRUE, trend = FALSE,
                          iter_control = list(tol = 1e-2, max_iter = 20, 
                                              verbose = TRUE),
                          em_control = list(tol = 1e-5, max_iter = 100),
                          lme_control = NULL,
                          mdfdr_control = list(fwer_ctrl_method = "holm", B = 100),
                          trend_control = NULL)
## Warning: Small sample size detected for the following group(s): 
## FMTPBS
## Variance estimation would be unstable when the sample size is < 5 per group
## Obtaining initial estimates ...
## ML iteration = 1, epsilon = 1.7
## ML iteration = 2, epsilon = 3.3
## ML iteration = 3, epsilon = 0.7
## ML iteration = 4, epsilon = 0.17
## ML iteration = 5, epsilon = 0.047
## ML iteration = 6, epsilon = 0.015
## ML iteration = 7, epsilon = 0.005
## Estimating sample-specific biases ...
## Sensitivity analysis for pseudo-count addition to 0s: ...
## ANCOM-BC2 primary results ...
## ANCOM-BC2 global test ...
## ANCOM-BC2 multiple pairwise comparisons ...
## ANCOM-BC2 multiple pairwise comparisons against the reference group ...
res_24_genus = res_label_24_genus$res_pair

ggplot(res_24_genus %>% mutate(taxon = factor(res_24_genus$taxon, levels = (res_24_genus %>% arrange(lfc_LabelFMTCTRL) %>% pull(taxon)))),
       aes(y=taxon, x=lfc_LabelFMTCTRL, fill = diff_LabelFMTCTRL)) + geom_bar(stat="identity") + ylab("Genus") + xlab("log fold change FMTCTRL vs. FMTABX") + labs(fill="Significance")

ggplot(res_24_genus %>% mutate(taxon = factor(res_24_genus$taxon, levels = (res_24_genus %>% arrange(lfc_LabelFMTPBS) %>% pull(taxon)))),
       aes(y=taxon, x=lfc_LabelFMTPBS, fill = diff_LabelFMTPBS)) + geom_bar(stat="identity") + ylab("Genus") + xlab("log fold change FMTPBS vs. FMTABX ") + labs(fill="Significance")

ggplot(res_24_genus %>% mutate(taxon = factor(res_24_genus$taxon, levels = (res_24_genus %>% arrange(lfc_LabelFMTPBS_LabelFMTCTRL) %>% pull(taxon)))),
       aes(y=taxon, x=lfc_LabelFMTPBS_LabelFMTCTRL, fill = diff_LabelFMTPBS_LabelFMTCTRL)) + geom_bar(stat="identity") + ylab("Genus") + xlab("log fold change FMTPBS vs. FMTCTRL") + labs(fill="Significance")

res_24_genus %>% mutate(taxon = factor(res_24_genus$taxon, levels = (res_24_genus %>% arrange(lfc_LabelFMTCTRL) %>% pull(taxon)))) %>% dplyr::select(taxon,lfc_LabelFMTCTRL, p_LabelFMTCTRL)
##                                    taxon lfc_LabelFMTCTRL p_LabelFMTCTRL
## 1                             Klebsiella      -1.91311652    1.000000000
## 2                          Lactobacillus       6.97730177    0.002701317
## 3                           Turicibacter       0.32751391    1.000000000
## 4                         Muribaculaceae      -0.72777524    1.000000000
## 5                            Akkermansia      -0.96015015    1.000000000
## 6                        Bifidobacterium       1.03973228    0.117642715
## 7                           Enterobacter       1.47024420    1.000000000
## 8                Lachnospiraceae_UCG-006      -0.55613034    1.000000000
## 9                              Roseburia      -3.14165558    0.002038026
## 10                          Enterococcus      -0.96775871    1.000000000
## 11                        Faecalibaculum      -0.41472264    0.747920967
## 12                     Lachnoclostridium      -0.35521542    1.000000000
## 13                             Alistipes      -0.36990352    1.000000000
## 14         Lachnospiraceae_NK4A136_group      -0.11859232    1.000000000
## 15                          uncultured_1      -0.17853825    1.000000000
## 16                                    A2       2.87909673    0.010197069
## 17 [Eubacterium]_coprostanoligenes_group       0.99637391    0.275321633
## 18                Erysipelatoclostridium      -1.55721388    1.000000000
## 19           Clostridium_sensu_stricto_1      -1.25557912    0.206209849
## 20                             Unknown_2       4.14727708    0.017023490
## 21                          uncultured_2       0.46678789    0.699737728
## 22                            Monoglobus      -2.17631727    0.007956081
## 23                        Incertae_Sedis      -0.10020572    0.869846903
## 24                             Unknown_3      -1.55241548    0.190374031
## 25                          uncultured_3      -0.72458353    1.000000000
## 26                         Enterorhabdus       0.21959953    1.000000000
## 27                      Colidextribacter       0.13726045    1.000000000
## 28                         Oscillibacter       0.84852040    1.000000000
## 29                          uncultured_4       3.18740343    1.000000000
## 30                          uncultured_5       1.49271868    0.244179098
## 31                         Adlercreutzia       1.19368731    0.153098958
## 32          Lachnospiraceae_FCS020_group      -0.94679890    1.000000000
## 33             Defluviitaleaceae_UCG-011       2.38342483    0.039301036
## 34                        Butyricicoccus       3.11259566    0.014101534
## 35            Clostridia_vadinBB60_group       0.08242171    0.909707656
## 36                        Marvinbryantia       1.87566950    1.000000000
## 37                          uncultured_6      -0.08717734    0.919530859
res_24_genus %>% mutate(taxon = factor(res_24_genus$taxon, levels = (res_24_genus %>% arrange(lfc_LabelFMTCTRL) %>% pull(taxon)))) %>% dplyr::select(taxon,lfc_LabelFMTCTRL, p_LabelFMTCTRL, q_LabelFMTCTRL) %>% filter(p_LabelFMTCTRL < 0.05)
##                       taxon lfc_LabelFMTCTRL p_LabelFMTCTRL q_LabelFMTCTRL
## 1             Lactobacillus         6.977302    0.002701317     0.01665812
## 2                 Roseburia        -3.141656    0.002038026     0.01256783
## 3                        A2         2.879097    0.010197069     0.05268485
## 4                 Unknown_2         4.147277    0.017023490     0.08795470
## 5                Monoglobus        -2.176317    0.007956081     0.04906250
## 6 Defluviitaleaceae_UCG-011         2.383425    0.039301036     0.20305535
## 7            Butyricicoccus         3.112596    0.014101534     0.07285792
res_24_genus %>% 
  mutate(fold_change = exp(lfc_LabelFMTCTRL), log_fold_change = log(fold_change, base = exp(1))) %>%
  dplyr::select(taxon, fold_change, log_fold_change) %>% 
  write.csv(paste0(FMT_dir, "fold_change_values.csv"))

Additional analysis: To evaluate the hypothesis that the Roseburia enrichment in the FMT-ABX group was already present at day 14, we leveraged ANCOMBC2 analysis for Day 14 data and found that Roseburia was already enriched in FMT-ABX vs. FMT-HD prior to FMT treatment (p=0.032).

genus_meta_df = otu_table(FMT_genus) %>% t() %>% data.frame() %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("Sample") %>%
  left_join(meta)
## Joining with `by = join_by(Sample)`
Roseburia = FMT_physeq_filtered_counts %>% tax_table ()%>% as.data.frame() %>% filter(Genus=="Roseburia") %>% rownames()

ggplot(genus_meta_df %>% filter(Timepoint==14, Label %in% c("FMTABX", "FMTCTRL")), aes(x=Label, y=!!sym(Roseburia))) + geom_boxplot() + facet_grid(.~Timepoint) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("FMTABX", "FMTCTRL"))) + ylab("Roseburia")

Data processing for RPCA analysis

Loaded physeq data is processed for analysis via FMT_RPCA.ipynb

FMT_physeq_nodonor_24 <- subset_samples(subset_samples(FMT_physeq_filtered_counts %>% tax_glom(taxrank = "Genus"), Label %in% c("FMTABX", "FMTCTRL", "FMTPBS")),
                                        Timepoint==24)
sample_metadata_rpca <- data.frame(sample_data(FMT_physeq_nodonor_24)) %>% rename(sampleid=Sample) %>% select(sampleid, everything())
subject_metadata_rpca <- sample_metadata_rpca %>% select(Subject, Label) %>% unique()

# Uncomment to prepare files for CTF
library(biomformat)
FMT_physeq.biom <- make_biom(otu_table(FMT_physeq_nodonor_24))
#write_biom(FMT_physeq.biom, biom_file="paste0(FMT_RPCA_path, "/16S_forRPCA.biom")
# write.table(sample_metadata_rpca, file=paste0(FMT_RPCA_path, "RPCA_sample_metadata.tsv",
#             quote=FALSE, sep='\t', row.names = FALSE)
# write.table(subject_metadata_rpca, file=paste0(FMT_dir, "RPCA_subject_metadata.tsv",
#             quote=FALSE, sep='\t', row.names = FALSE)

Loaded results following RPCA analysis via FMT_RPCA.ipynb

ord_text = readLines(paste0(FMT_RPCA_path, "/16S_RPCA/biplot_unzipped/629da861-81c6-48df-a17a-8f24eeca9919/data/ordination.txt"))

feat_ord = read.table(textConnection(ord_text[str_detect(ord_text, "otu")]), header = FALSE, col.names = c("Feature", "PC1", "PC2", "PC3")) %>% 
  left_join(tax_table(FMT_physeq_nodonor_24) %>% 
              as.data.frame() %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("Feature"))
## Joining with `by = join_by(Feature)`
otu_filt_counts = FMT_physeq_filtered_counts %>% otu_table %>% as.data.frame()
tax_filt = FMT_physeq_filtered_counts %>% tax_table %>% as.data.frame()
perc_10 = round(nrow(feat_ord)/10) 

PC1_full_num = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% filter(PC1<0) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC1_full_denom = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% filter(PC1>=0) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC2_full_num = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% filter(PC2<0) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC2_full_denom = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% filter(PC2>=0) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC3_full_num = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% filter(PC3<0) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC3_full_denom = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% filter(PC3>=0) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()


PC1_10perc_num = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% arrange(desc(PC1)) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC1_10perc_denom = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% arrange(PC1) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC2_10perc_num = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% arrange(desc(PC2)) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC2_10perc_denom = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% arrange(PC2) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC3_10perc_num = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% arrange(desc(PC3)) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()
PC3_10perc_denom = otu_filt_counts[feat_ord %>% arrange(PC3) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% colSums()


PC1_full = log(PC1_full_num/PC1_full_denom) %>% data.frame(PC1_full=.) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("sampleid")
PC2_full = log(PC2_full_num/PC2_full_denom) %>% data.frame(PC2_full=.) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("sampleid")
PC3_full = log(PC3_full_num/PC3_full_denom) %>% data.frame(PC3_full=.) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("sampleid")
PC1_10perc = log(PC1_10perc_num/PC1_10perc_denom) %>% data.frame(PC1_10perc=.) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("sampleid")
PC2_10perc = log(PC2_10perc_num/PC2_10perc_denom) %>% data.frame(PC2_10perc=.) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("sampleid")
PC3_10perc = log(PC3_10perc_num/PC3_10perc_denom) %>% data.frame(PC3_10perc=.) %>% tibble::rownames_to_column("sampleid")

log_ratio_df = full_join(full_join(full_join(full_join(full_join(PC1_full, PC2_full),
                                                       PC3_full), 
                                             PC1_10perc), 
                                   PC2_10perc), 
                         PC3_10perc)
## Joining with `by = join_by(sampleid)`
## Joining with `by = join_by(sampleid)`
## Joining with `by = join_by(sampleid)`
## Joining with `by = join_by(sampleid)`
## Joining with `by = join_by(sampleid)`
subj_ord = read.table(textConnection(ord_text[str_detect(ord_text, "FMT")]), header = FALSE, col.names = c("sampleid", "PC1", "PC2", "PC3")) %>% left_join(log_ratio_df) %>% left_join(sample_metadata_rpca) 
## Joining with `by = join_by(sampleid)`
## Joining with `by = join_by(sampleid)`
PC2_denom_df = tax_filt[feat_ord %>% arrange((PC2)) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% dplyr::select(Class, Genus)
PC2_num_df = tax_filt[feat_ord %>% arrange(desc(PC2)) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% dplyr::select(Class, Genus)
PC3_denom_df = tax_filt[feat_ord %>% arrange((PC3)) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% dplyr::select(Class, Genus)
PC3_num_df = tax_filt[feat_ord %>% arrange(desc(PC3)) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% pull(Feature),] %>% dplyr::select(Class, Genus)

bind_rows(
  feat_ord %>% arrange(desc(PC2)) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% mutate(Ranking = paste0("Numerator: ", 1:8)) %>%
    dplyr::select(Ranking, PC2, Class, Genus),
  feat_ord %>% arrange((PC2)) %>% slice(1:perc_10) %>% mutate(Ranking = paste0("Denominator: ", 1:8)) %>%
    dplyr::select(Ranking, PC2, Class, Genus)) %>% write.csv(paste0(FMT_dir, "Table1.csv"))

Displaying RPCA results (Note that the final figure was generated in PRISM)

Equivalent plot to Figure 2A (which was generated in PRISM)

ggplot(subj_ord, aes(x=PC2, y=PC3, shape=Label, color=Label)) + geom_point()

Equivalent plot to Figure 2B (which was generated in PRISM)

ggplot(subj_ord, aes(x=Label, y=PC2, fill=Label)) + geom_boxplot() + geom_point() + facet_grid(.~Timepoint) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("FMTCTRL", "FMTABX"), c("FMTABX", "FMTPBS")))

Equivalent plot to Figure 2B (which was generated in PRISM)

ggplot(subj_ord, aes(x=Label, y=PC2_10perc, fill=Label)) + geom_boxplot() + 
            geom_point() + facet_grid(.~Timepoint) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + ylab("PC 2log ratio: top/bottom 10 features") +
            stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("FMTCTRL", "FMTABX"),
                                                  c("FMTCTRL", "FMTPBS"),
                                                  c("FMTPBS", "FMTABX")))
